<a aria-label="Link to Medium" href="https://medium.com/@oslobizreg" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank"> <svg class="w-17 h-17 lg:w-20 lg:h-20 xl:w-27 xl:h-27" data-name="Icon Medium" height="27"
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Link to Medium" href="https://medium.com/@oslobizreg" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank"> <svg class="w-17 h-17 lg:w-20 lg:h-20 xl:w-27 xl:h-27" data-name="Icon Medium" height="27"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Insight to Oslo and the startup ecosystem | Oslo Business Region

https://oslobusinessregion.no/statistics
Avvik: 165 | Bestått: 85
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (73 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Founder feature: Revolutionizing Airspace for… | Oslo Business Region

https://oslobusinessregion.no/articles/airdodge-revolutionizing-airspace-for-drones-2
Avvik: 71 | Bestått: 40
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (33 avvik)

<a aria-label="Link to Medium" href="https://medium.com/@oslobizreg" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank"> <svg class="w-17 h-17 lg:w-20 lg:h-20 xl:w-27 xl:h-27" data-name="Icon Medium" height="27"
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Link to Instagram'

<a aria-label="Link to Instagram" href="https://www.instagram.com/oslobizreg/" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank"> <svg class="w-17 h-17 lg:w-20 lg:h-20 xl:w-27 xl:h-27" data-name="Icon Instagram

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)

https://oslobusinessregion.no/

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://oslobusinessregion.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://oslobusinessregion.no --max-pages 21 --format html
